before_state.reason: Licensed downloads may create a Freepik account download/license record and local files. This source tool does not yet save real before-state for those writes.

plan.name: Example asset name
plan.note: Dry-run does not call the Freepik download endpoint. Current apply requires explicit no-snapshot approval before the licensed download endpoint when no saved snapshot is available.

steps: Confirm no Freepik download/license endpoint was called.
Confirm no binary download was fetched.
Confirm no destination file or inventory row was written.
verification_plan.required_before_live_write: Add command-specific before-state or provider-backup support before allowing licensed downloads.

recovery.restore_note: Licensed downloads and license records cannot be rolled back by this CLI. Local cleanup is manual.
